title: Amaute in La Thak Asa Uh Hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong hehpihna phatna’ng la thak om kim hi,
A um tading thupha bel ahi ding hi;
si a a piangkik a minthanna,
Ka genna sa nuam bel Pasian kiangah.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tuni sipha tawh a kisil lote in,
Tua la thak kuamah in sa thei lo ding hi;
Phatna lungdamin limtakin la sa ni.
